storyInfo: For different reasons, Pallas, Kassandra, Astynomos Lydia, and the visiting priest from Corinia all nominate Titi to the position of supervisor for the final stages of the First Temple rebuilding project.

attributes.content: This is the first time you've shown, since that young acolyte of yours glared at me last week.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: It's not easy, managing Endymion Temple and the rebuilding of the First Temple at the same time.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Folia is just worried that I'm overworked. She knows we've been friends since our priest school days.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Which made it all the harder to accept that I brought you trouble as soon as I got back, I guess.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Pallas...
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I knew we were both in trouble when you showed up at Endymion Temple to have your dream interpreted as an ordinary Minoan instead of using the priests' passage, six months ago.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: In most cases, divine revelation can be classified into certain common categories, whether it came in the form of a dream or a sudden vision.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I know. We learned them by heart at school, so ordinary priests without special talents could guide those who received revelations.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: But the vision that you brought was not found in any classic tale... I had no doubt that it was a powerful revelation, which made me very uneasy.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Don't worry. We'll find a way.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: You shouldn't have quit the priesthood. You might have been able to find help...
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: And hide my condition, continuing to be the legendary 'Goddess of Victory' on the border?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I didn't want to complicate things, even if another has taken up the title. Besides, the heroes came a long way to call me back. I had to be honest with myself.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: ...Looks like Rhodes Island has treated you well.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Of course. Did I ever tell you that I founded a 'Minoan League' on Rhodes Island?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Are there so many Minoans who left home to seek treatment?
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: There are plenty, although Erato and Vulcan are the only true Minoans in the league. The others are in it because they have a spiritual fascination with our country.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I'll introduce them, when we have a chance. They're all full of heroic spirit, with great passion for poetry, art, and brewing.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: So you founded a drinking league.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: That's one way to put it. It's not quite the same as having you around, though. You may not hold your drink particularly well, but no one in our year brewed better than you.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I remember how you tied up your sleeves and pounded the grapes like a seasoned winemaker at the intercollegiate conference. You looked amazing.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I see you have a craving. What happened to the formula I gave you?
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I lost it when I went to Akroti. I finally escaped my torment when my Sarkaz bodyguard gave me the recipe for the secret brew of Kazdel.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I never worried you would have trouble making friends. First the Sarkaz bodyguard, now the Sargonian ambassador.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: You heard about the fruit farmers and the craftsmen. Titi can be trusted.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I don't doubt Kyría Mashayer's cleverness, or her friendly outlook towards our country, but her position remains sensitive.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: If I didn't stop you, would you have put her in charge of the play that we already discussed, in addition to the venue of the exchange ceremony?
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Is it that you trust her too much, or...?
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: You're frowning again, Kassandra. I just let myself get a little lazy, having been away from the priesthood for so long.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: You would never have become a legend in the borderlands, if you were the type to shirk responsibility.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I don't mind taking charge of the rebuilding project on your behalf. I just think it's a shame. You're better at dealing with people, and the craftsmen trust you.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I thought you made the proposal to the people so they would return to heroic tradition and remember the heroic spirit.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I did.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: And that's exactly why it doesn't matter who's in charge.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Our people venerate the heroes, but they've gradually forgotten that Minoan prosperity was not only built by a few heroes.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: 'The heroes came from the people, from all walks of life.'
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: You could always read my mind.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I know what you're trying to say... but with the rebuilding of the temple entering its final stage, it's even more important than ever to have a supervisor.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I think we'll have one soon.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I saw Lydia headed to the temple square.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: What do you think this Astynomos, who has quietly been at odds with us from the beginning and is trying to take the play out of the priests' hands, is going there for?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: We meet at last, Your Excellency Ambassador Mashayer.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: And who might you be?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I'm the Astynomos of Athenius, called Lydia. I am overseeing this relic exchange between our two nations.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Oh! I'm so sorry, Astynomos. I should have visited you first thing when I got to Athenius. I didn't think...
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: You came into Athenius by the ancient route to follow in Kereseira's footsteps, didn't you?
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: There is no need to apologize to a Minoan for your love of our epics, our culture.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: If anything, I should be thanking you for resolving the dispute between the fruit farmers and craftsmen. The rebuilding of the First Temple could not have proceeded so smoothly without you.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: I simply did my part.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I believe you've already met Behnui? I take it the venue and details of the exchange ceremony have not been confirmed.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Correct.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Rather than do it behind closed doors in a private room, what do you think of holding the ceremony beneath the statue of Kereseira, to be witnessed by her and all of Athenius?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: You want to hold the exchange ceremony at the First Temple square?
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Yes. You are aware that I brought the most precious treasure of the Varjavandabad Museum, to be exchanged for the technical data that the Sargonians left behind during the construction of the Three Poleis.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: It's a part of many heroic Minoan stories, and closely linked to Kereseira herself.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Seeing the completed statue on the square was an awe-inspiring experience. Her brave visage and the relic that I carry complement each other.
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I understand that the exchange ceremony is supposed to begin with a classical play, in accordance with Minoan tradition. What better place to do it than the First Temple's new amphitheater?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Would that be a problem?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Oh, Kassandra from Endymion Temple reminded me that any use of the First Temple should be discussed with her...
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Kassandra...
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: It's the Astynomos' Office's responsibility to lighten the burden on the busy priests by handling trivial matters. I'll communicate with her.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: I was concerned about the lack of proper supervision in the rebuilding process because of the emulation of ancient methods, which has resulted in significant delays. I thought it might not be the most dignified of venues.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: I don't mind—
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: However, all our problems could be solved if you are officially made the supervisor of the rebuilding project.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Say what now?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: The rebuilding of the temple is entering its final stages. We've reached the point where decisiveness and efficiency are more important than careful planning.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: I'm sure you already have a fair idea of what is going on, having befriended the craftsmen and solved their issues.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Besides, I understand that you received an advanced education in museology in Columbia, including studies in architecture.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Putting the finishing touches on the temple and readying it for opening shouldn't present too much difficulty, should it?
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: I mean, it's true that I designed and supervised the expansion of my museum, but it's not nearly as big as this temple...
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Besides, is it really appropriate for a Sargonian ambassador to supervise the rebuilding of the First Temple?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: Your request that the exchange ceremony take place at the First Temple is ample proof of your understanding of the relic and Minoan culture.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: I am in full support of your proposal, and I'm sure the ever-considerate Kassandra won't object.
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I didn't expect the ambassador to be such a polite and humble young lady.
Períandros?
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: Greetings from Corinia, land of trade and merchants, Your Excellency Ambassador Mashayer of Sargon.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: I am here as Corinia's representative to the exchange ceremony, at the Astynomos' request. I happened to overhear your conversation and couldn't help but stop to listen.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: May I ask you a question—would you participate in the rebuilding of the First Temple, if your status were not a concern?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Of course!
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: It would be a great honor to participate in the restoration of such a wonderful example of Minoan architecture, not to mention the knowledge that could be gained! I would be delighted just to hew one piece of marble for it!
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: In that case, why trouble yourself unnecessarily?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Trouble myself... what?
attributes.name: Titi

attributes.content: I have a little suggestion that might solve our present problem. As I see it, the two of you are in full agreement, but for this little issue of Ambassador Mashayer's status.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: It's a sensitive issue, and Ambassador Mashayer's concerns are certainly well-founded. On the other hand, the Astynomos here is seeking a capable supervisor who has the support of the people, in order to keep the temple project on track.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: What better way to resolve this than Minos's most ancient process?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: You mean...?
attributes.name: Lydia

attributes.content: A vote.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: A referendum held on the First Temple square. Let the citizens of Athenius participating in the rebuilding decide whether to accept Ambassador Mashayer's supervision or not.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: ...She's really the Sargonian ambassador.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Travesty! The theater of Kereseira's First Temple was not built to host a diplomatic farce!
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: That Sargonian said she brought a relic in exchange for the technical data from the Three Poleis? I knew that cargo didn't feel like movie figurines.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: The shape, the weight, and its relevance to Kereseira... could it be...?
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: The gall! To use stolen Minoan treasure to buy Minoan trust!
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Not if I have anything to say about it...
attributes.name: Xanthos
